# Excellent Students' Academy (ESA)

> Coaching institute in Rohini Sector 7, New Delhi for Class 1 to 12 students. Math, Science, Commerce, English and all CBSE subjects. Founded 2015 - currently in its eleventh year of operation. Consistent CBSE board results across North Delhi.

Located at C7/72, 2nd Floor, Sector 7, Rohini, New Delhi 110085. Two minutes from Rohini West metro. Serving students from Rohini, Pitampura, Shalimar Bagh, Model Town, Ashok Vihar, Mukherjee Nagar, Kohat Enclave, Saraswati Vihar, Punjabi Bagh, Rani Bagh, Shastri Nagar and nearby North Delhi localities.

Phone: +91 9458012793 | WhatsApp: +91 8750663995 | Email: excellentstudentsacademy1@gmail.com | Website: https://www.theesa.in

## Programs

- [Foundation (Class 1 to 5)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-1-5): Concept-building tuition for primary students. Math, English, EVS, Hindi, Computer. Small batches, individual attention.
- [Middle School (Class 6 to 8)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-6-8): Structured coaching with weekly chapter tests. CBSE, ICSE and State Boards. Math, Science, Social Science, English, Hindi, Sanskrit.
- [Board Prep (Class 9 and 10)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-9-10): CBSE Class 10 board preparation. Full syllabus by January, 10+ previous year papers practice, weekly chapter tests, monthly mock exams.
- [Senior Secondary (Class 11 and 12)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#grades-11-12): Science (PCM/PCB), Commerce and Arts streams. Board scoring plus JEE/NEET foundation. Stream-wise senior faculty.
- [Crash Courses (Class 6 to 12)](https://www.theesa.in/programs#crash): 4 to 8 week intensive revision before board exams. Full syllabus revision plus 10+ mock papers.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://www.theesa.in): Hero, programs overview, results, testimonials, demo class booking.
- [About](https://www.theesa.in/about): Story, mission, 9-year timeline, values.
- [Faculty](https://www.theesa.in/faculty): Eleven full-time mentors. Postgraduates and B.Tech holders with average 6+ years coaching experience.
- [Results](https://www.theesa.in/results): Recent CBSE board toppers, scores, and class-wise statistics.
- [Gallery](https://www.theesa.in/gallery): Real photos from inside the centre: classroom sessions, weekly tests, Saraswati Puja, Independence Day, Teachers' Day, birthdays, and the Sector 7 exterior.
- [Materials](https://www.theesa.in/materials): Class-wise PDF study materials (chapter notes, sample papers, mock tests) shared via Google Drive folders per class.
- [Contact](https://www.theesa.in/contact): Enquiry form, WhatsApp, phone, location, embedded map.
- [FAQ](https://www.theesa.in/faq): Demo classes, fees, batch timings, subjects, home tuition, admission process.

## Blog (educational + local SEO)

- [Meet the ESA Toppers of 2026](https://www.theesa.in/blog/esa-toppers-2026-class-10-12-rohini): Class 10 and 12 students who scored 90+ in CBSE boards, with their habits and routines.
- [How to Choose a Coaching Institute in Rohini](https://www.theesa.in/blog/how-to-choose-coaching-institute-rohini-parents-guide): Parent's checklist for evaluating coaching centres in North Delhi.
- [5 Things ESA Students Do Differently](https://www.theesa.in/blog/5-things-esa-students-do-differently-rohini-coaching): Habits that drive higher CBSE scores.
- [Best Class 10 Coaching in Rohini](https://www.theesa.in/blog/best-class-10-coaching-rohini): What parents should look for in 2026.

## Key facts about ESA

- Founded 2015 by Mr. Chandan Prajapati (B.Tech Mechanical Engineering)
- 11 years of continuous operation in Rohini Sector 7
- 500+ students mentored since founding
- Recent batch (2026 CBSE): 84% average board score, every student passed
- 32 students in the recent batch scored above 90% in CBSE boards
- Air-conditioned classrooms on two floors
- Weekly Saturday chapter tests, scored within 48 hours, scorecards sent to parents on Monday
- Monthly one-on-one parent meetings on the first Saturday of every month
- 7 days of free demo classes for every prospective student (no registration fee, no commitment)
- Faculty-prepared notes for Class 8 to 12
- Home tuition available across Rohini, Pitampura, Shalimar Bagh, Model Town and nearby

## Hours

Monday to Saturday: 10:00 AM to 8:30 PM. Sunday: Closed (occasional doubt sessions on request).

## Frequently asked questions

### Where is ESA located?

C7/72, 2nd Floor, Sector 7, Rohini, New Delhi 110085. Two minutes walk from the Rohini West metro side. We are the bright yellow signboard above Insurance Experts on the main road.

### Which classes does ESA teach?

Class 1 to Class 12, across CBSE, ICSE and State Boards. Subjects include Mathematics, Science, Social Science, English, Hindi, Sanskrit (Class 6 to 10), and Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Accountancy, Business Studies, Economics, Computer Science (Class 11 to 12).

### How does the free demo work?

You sit through up to 7 days of real classes - the actual batch your child would join, with the actual faculty. There is no separate "demo class". You meet other students and parents, observe the teaching method, and enrol only when convinced. No registration fee.

### How are the weekly tests structured?

Every Saturday between 5 PM and 8 PM, ESA students write a chapter test on whatever was taught that week. Papers are scored within 48 hours and a scorecard is sent to parents on Monday morning via WhatsApp.

### Does ESA do home tuition?

Yes. Home tuition is available across Rohini, Pitampura, Shalimar Bagh, Model Town, Ashok Vihar and nearby North Delhi localities. Same faculty, same teaching method, in the comfort of your home.

### What makes ESA different from other coaching institutes in Rohini?

Three things. First, batch sizes are capped so no student goes unnoticed. Second, faculty stay with the same batches for years rather than rotating gig-style. Third, ESA measures success on average board score across all students, not on a handful of toppers.

### Who is the founder of ESA?

Mr. Chandan Prajapati, a B.Tech (Mechanical Engineering) graduate who realised teaching was his real calling. He still personally mentors every Class 11 and Class 12 Mathematics batch at the Rohini centre.

### What fees does ESA charge?

Fees are nominal and intentionally accessible. Pricing is monthly and varies by class and subject combination. Contact us on WhatsApp at +91 8750663995 or call +91 9458012793 for the current fee structure.

### Does ESA offer JEE / NEET preparation?

ESA offers JEE and NEET foundation alongside board prep for Class 11 and 12 Science students. The focus is on building strong concept clarity through the board syllabus first, then layering competitive exam practice on top.

### Can a student enrol mid-year?

Yes. Mid-year admission is possible if there is room in the relevant batch. A diagnostic test helps the faculty pinpoint gaps and design a catch-up plan in the first two weeks.
